    C

    canMoveTo(Position, Board) - Method in class core.Piece
    Determines if the piece can legally move to the specified position.
    canUseMagic() - Method in class pieces.Archmage
    Checks if the Archmage's magic attack is ready to use.
    ChessApp - Class in ui
    The primary graphical user interface for the chess game.
    ChessApp() - Constructor for class ui.ChessApp
     
    color - Variable in class core.Piece
     
    Color - Enum Class in core
    Represents the color of a game piece or player.
    core - package core
     
    createStandardBoard() - Static method in class util.GameSetup
    Creates a new game board and populates it with the standard starting configuration for both the White and Black players.
